function x(x)return S[x+(-475056+530702)]end for x,n in ipairs({{647630-647629;-621852+622270},{422669-422668;-98665+98853},{-669604+669793;969640+-969222}})do while n[280348-280347]<n[-402959-(-402961)]do end do local x=string.char local return(function(S,y,F,a,l,r,R,B,Z,H,T,A,n,k,m,u,o,Y,w,d,J,j,z)d,A,k,n,j,u,o,m,Z,T,B,H,Y,w,J,z=function(S,x)local y=B(x)local F=function(F,a)return n(S,{F,a},x,y)end return F
